paragraphs.text: I'm Vaishnavi Singh. I study {Computing and Law|Computing and Law with a double major in Political Science} at SMU, in my final year. I work on AI safety and governance.

Research: I'm an incoming {LawAI Fellow|LawAI Fellow at the Institute of Law and AI, Legal Frontiers stream, in person from January to May 2027}, attending the {LFAI Workshop|LFAI Workshop at Jesus College, Cambridge, June 10 to 13, 2026}. Alumna of {OAISI|the Oxford AI Safety Initiative, where I completed the ARENA 7.0 curriculum and contributed ML engineering to AI safety research at ARBOx3} and {BASIS Berkeley|the Berkeley AI Safety Student Initiative, where I worked on AI moral status and personhood, resulting in a paper accepted to the FAST Workshop at AAAI 2026}.

Industry: {Confide Platform|Confide Platform (2024 to May 2026), where I built an AI governance product covering policy generation, evaluation tooling, and incident reporting}. Previously at {KPMG|KPMG Technology Risk Advisory, reviewing AI systems against the EU AI Act, NIST RMF, and related standards}.
